description: Having a concentration in Artificial Intelligence (5th semester) as part of my Informatics degree.
Had a bootcamp converted for my 6th semester credit. The bootcamp name was Korean-ASEAN Digital Bootcamp held at BPPTIK.
Achieved a Duolingo English Test score of 130.
Intensive 6-week bootcamp covering backend and full-stack web development.
Final project: full-stack Movie Review web app using MERN stack, JWT authentication, and OAuth 2.0.
Credited as a 6th semester course at President University.
Organized by Korea Internet & Security Agency (KISA) and BPPTIK, Indonesia.
